About.title: About us
About.description: Dedicated to fostering dialogue, collaboration, and meaningful connections.

team.title: Our team
team.description: Our team is dedicated to fostering dialogue, collaboration, and meaningful connections. We are a team of professionals who are passionate about creating events that inspire collaboration and produce tangible outcomes.

philosophy.title: Our philosophy
philosophy.description: We believe meaningful progress starts with meaningful connection. Every forum and exhibition we organize is designed to spark dialogue, encourage collaboration, and create lasting value for participants. Guided by professionalism, innovation, and excellence, we create environments where ideas are shared openly, partnerships are built, and opportunities for long-term cooperation and sustainable growth emerge.

services.title: Our services
services.description: We provide comprehensive end-to-end event management solutions, delivering international forums, conferences, exhibitions, business expos, B2B and B2G meetings, official delegations, networking events, and tailor-made programs of any scale. From strategic planning and logistics to participant management, branding, and on-site execution, we ensure every event is professionally organized, seamlessly delivered, and designed to achieve measurable results for our clients and partners.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: Our mission is to foster meaningful dialogue, strengthen international collaboration, and create lasting partnerships that drive sustainable growth and innovation. We create platforms where governments, businesses, international organizations, industry leaders, and experts come together to exchange knowledge, explore new opportunities, and build valuable connections. Through the organization of international forums, conferences, exhibitions, and business events, we deliver experiences that inspire collaboration and produce tangible outcomes. We are committed to creating events that not only facilitate productive discussions but also encourage long-term partnerships, support strategic initiatives, and contribute to the development of industries, economies, and global cooperation.
mission.connectDesc: Building bridges between people, institutions, and nations.
mission.inspireDesc: Encouraging innovative thinking and meaningful dialogue.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.description1: We envision a future where international cooperation, innovation, and strategic partnerships drive sustainable economic growth and global development. Our goal is to create world-class platforms that connect governments, businesses, international organizations, and industry leaders, enabling them to address shared challenges, exchange knowledge, and unlock new opportunities for collaboration.
vision.description2: We aspire to set the benchmark for international forums, conferences, and exhibitions by delivering exceptional events that inspire meaningful dialogue and generate lasting impact. Through continuous growth, innovation, and an expanding global network, we aim to strengthen international connections and transform ideas into partnerships that create measurable value for industries, communities, and economies worldwide.

weAre.title: We are
weAre.description1: OGUZ Forum & Expo brings together leaders, innovators, and decision-makers from across industries and borders. We create the spaces where ideas are exchanged, partnerships are formed, and shared goals turn into action. Our events are designed to foster meaningful dialogue, encourage strategic networking, and build relationships that continue to create value long after the event has concluded.
weAre.description2: From international forums to large-scale exhibitions, our work is built on trust, professionalism, and a deep understanding of what it takes to connect people and organizations across the region and beyond. Every event is carefully planned to support knowledge exchange, inspire collaboration, and deliver measurable results for our partners, participants, and stakeholders across diverse industries and international markets.

Cookie.title: Cookies Policy
Cookie.description: Optimizing your experience through responsible cookie usage.
Cookie.text: We use cookies to improve your experience on our website and to analyze site traffic. By continuing to use the website, you agree to our Cookies Policy.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.description: Protecting your data with transparency, security, and care.

sections.title: 1. General Provisions
sections.body: This Privacy Policy defines the procedure for processing and protecting personal data of users of the website oguzforum.com (hereinafter referred to as the "Website") and applies to all information that the Website Administration may obtain about the user while using the Website.

sections.title: 2. Data Collection
sections.body: We may collect the following data:
items: Personal data provided by the user (name, email address, phone number, etc.);
Website usage data (IP address, browser type, device information, etc.).

sections.title: 3. Data Usage
items: Improve website performance and user experience;
Communicate with users and respond to inquiries.

sections.title: 4. Data Sharing with Third Parties
sections.body: We do not share users' personal data with third parties without their consent, except when required by law or necessary to provide our services.

sections.title: 5. Data Security
sections.body: The Website Administration takes all reasonable organizational and technical measures to protect users' personal data from unauthorized access, modification, disclosure, or destruction.

sections.title: 6. Data Retention
sections.body: Your data is stored only as long as necessary to provide our services or meet legal requirements.

sections.title: 7. User Rights
items: Withdraw consent for data processing at any time.

sections.title: 8. Policy Updates
sections.body: We may update this policy. All changes will be posted on the website with the effective date.

sections.title: 9. Contact
sections.body: If you have any questions regarding this privacy policy, please contact us at:

Terms.title: Terms of Use
Terms.description: Clear terms guiding the fair and lawful use of our website.
paragraphs: Welcome to Oguz forum | expo. By accessing and using this website, you agree to comply with these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please discontinue use of the website.

The content provided on this website is intended for general informational purposes only. While we make reasonable efforts to ensure that all information is accurate and up to date, we make no representations or warranties regarding the completeness, accuracy, reliability, or availability of any content on the website.

All materials published on this website, including text, graphics, images, logos, documents, and other content, are the property of Oguz forum | expo or are used with appropriate permission and are protected by applicable intellectual property laws. No part of this website may be copied, reproduced, distributed, or used for commercial purposes without prior written consent.

You agree to use this website only for lawful purposes and in a manner that does not interfere with its operation, security, or accessibility. Any attempt to gain unauthorized access to the website, its systems, or related services is strictly prohibited.
This website may contain links to third-party websites. Such links are provided for convenience only, and we are not responsible for the content, policies, or practices of any external websites.

To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, Oguz forum | expo shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, or special damages arising from the use of, or inability to use, this website or any information contained within it.
We reserve the right to update or modify these Terms of Use at any time without prior notice. Continued use of the website following any changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
